draft:
Dear Officer:

I am writing this letter to provide my strongest recommendation for Ms. Priya Nayak’s petition for extraordinary ability classification as a product manager and entrepreneur in the field of cybersecurity for generative AI applications. As an experienced venture capitalist and technology investor, I have had the opportunity to closely observe Ms. Nayak’s work and contributions to the field. In this letter, I will outline my background, my professional relationship with Ms. Nayak, and my assessment of her extraordinary abilities and contributions to the field of cybersecurity for generative AI applications.

To provide some context, I am a founding board member of TechCorp (now Innovate Solutions) and have been deeply involved in the technology industry for many years. I am the founder of VentureSphere Partners, a venture capital firm that focuses on early-stage technology investments. Through VentureSphere Partners, I have invested in and served on the boards of several successful technology companies, including SecuriGate and Digital Dispatch. My extensive experience in the technology sector has given me a deep understanding of the qualities and capabilities that make an individual truly extraordinary in their field.

I first became acquainted with Ms. Nayak through her work as the co-founder and CEO of Cryptoguard Solutions, a company that VentureSphere Partners has invested in. Cryptoguard Solutions focuses on securing generative AI applications for enterprises, addressing the unique data security challenges posed by these technologies. As an investor, I have had the opportunity to closely observe Ms. Nayak’s work and contributions to the field. Her deep understanding of the unique security challenges posed by AI, combined with her innovative approach to addressing these issues, has made her a standout figure in the industry.

Having had the opportunity to closely observe Ms. Nayak's work and contributions to the field, I can confidently say that she is an individual of extraordinary ability. Her deep understanding of the unique security challenges posed by AI, combined with her innovative approach to addressing these issues, has made her a standout figure in the industry. Her work has been recognized in multiple newsletters, podcast series, and industry analyses, highlighting her expertise and thought leadership in the field.

For example, Ms. Nayak's views were featured in the Cyber Insight newsletter and podcast, where she was highlighted alongside other prominent figures such as the Chairman of Cyberion, the CISO of BlueJeans Denim, and the CEO of DefenseAI. The Cyber Insight Series has a high-profile audience of over 30,000 members, including more than 1,900 CXOs and 3,165 director-level and above members. Being featured in such a respected platform underscores Ms. Nayak's standing in the cybersecurity community.

Additionally, Ms. Nayak's insights on managing data overload were featured in TechReview, where she was mentioned alongside the Life Sciences CTO of DataDrift and the MD and Chief Data Officer of Capital Bank. Her inclusion in this article highlights her expertise in data security and her ability to provide valuable insights on critical industry challenges.

Ms. Nayak was also featured in the Security Ventures blog as part of the "Silicon Valley Security Circle," which highlights talented founders from Silicon Valley and the security companies they have founded. This recognition places her alongside top cybersecurity CEOs and underscores her reputation as a leading figure in the industry. Security Ventures is a newsletter with over 16,000 active subscribers, further demonstrating the reach and impact of Ms. Nayak's work.

These features in respected publications and platforms underscore Ms. Nayak's standing as a thought leader in the field of cybersecurity for generative AI applications. Her ability to provide valuable insights and contribute to critical industry discussions highlights her extraordinary ability and expertise.

One of Ms. Nayak's most significant contributions to the field is her work with Cryptoguard Solutions. As the co-founder and CEO, she has led the development of a groundbreaking product that addresses the unique data security challenges posed by generative AI applications. Cryptoguard Solutions's technology ensures that data privacy and security remain uncompromised when using AI systems like ChatBotIQ, making it an invaluable tool for enterprises working with sensitive data.

The success of Cryptoguard Solutions's product is a testament to Ms. Nayak's extraordinary ability as a product manager and entrepreneur. The product has been adopted by multiple top American enterprises, demonstrating its effectiveness and value in the market. Moreover, Cryptoguard Solutions has raised nearly $4 million in seed funding from top-tier investors, including Y Seed Incubator, Velocity Ventures, and other angel investors. This level of investment is a clear indication of the confidence that the venture capital community has in Ms. Nayak's vision and leadership.

Ms. Nayak's ability to secure such significant funding and drive the adoption of Cryptoguard Solutions's product in the market highlights her unique expertise and contributions to the field. Her work is not only addressing critical security challenges but also advancing the adoption of AI technologies by alleviating concerns around data privacy and security.

In addition to her work with Cryptoguard Solutions, Ms. Nayak has made significant contributions to the field of cybersecurity through her previous roles. At Cyber Guardrails Inc., she served as a Senior Product Manager for Data Assurance Prevention (DAP), where she owned the API-based DAP product, a $50 million ARR product with a mature install base of large enterprises. During her tenure, she doubled the business to over $100 million in ARR within two years and supported top enterprise and government clients in deriving value from the product. She also played a key role in integrating NexGenSecurity.ai, a $36 million acquisition, into the DAP product, bringing new real-time integrations and advanced detection capabilities.

Before her time at Cyber Guardrails Inc., Ms. Nayak worked at SecuCloud, where she served as a Senior Product Manager for Embedded Security. She achieved over 30% ARR growth for the embedded security product by revamping the strategy and reversing a negative trend from 2020. She also conceptualized and launched an award-winning serverless security product, pioneering SecuCloud's entry into Cloud Native Protection. Additionally, she developed the go-to-market strategy for the acquisition of SafeAnalytics, a transaction closed by SecuCloud in October 2020.

Ms. Nayak's track record of driving significant business growth and launching innovative products in top-tier organizations underscores her extraordinary ability as a product manager and entrepreneur. Her deep domain expertise in cybersecurity and her ability to deliver impactful solutions have made her a highly respected and sought-after professional in the industry.

In conclusion, Ms. Priya Nayak is an individual of extraordinary ability in the field of cybersecurity for generative AI applications. Her work with Cryptoguard Solutions, as well as her previous contributions at Cyber Guardrails Inc. and SecuCloud, demonstrate her unique expertise and ability to drive significant advancements in the industry. Her insights and thought leadership have been recognized in respected publications, further underscoring her standing as a leader in her field. I have no doubt that Ms. Nayak will continue to make significant contributions to the field of cybersecurity and AI, and I wholeheartedly support her petition for extraordinary ability classification.

Please feel free to contact me if you need any further information or clarification regarding my recommendation for Ms. Nayak.

Yours very truly,

Rohan Selvam

Founding Board Member

TechCorp (now Innovate Solutions)

[email contact here]
final:
Dear Officer:

I am writing to provide my wholehearted recommendation for Mr. Priyank Nayak, an extraordinary entrepreneur and product manager in the field of cybersecurity for generative artificial intelligence (AI) applications.

To provide a brief personal background, I am a founding board member of TechCorp (now Innovate Solutions) with a long-standing involvement in the technology industry. Before founding VentureSphere Partners, a venture capital firm focused on early-stage technology investments, I was an officer at PrimeShop.com under Ajay Patel following PrimeShop's acquisition of WebMall, where I was President. At PrimeShop, I contributed to significant customer base expansion during 1998/1999. Earlier, as part of the NetWave executive team from 1994, I was crucial in establishing partnerships for widespread distribution of their browser and server products. Through VentureSphere Partners, I've invested in and held board positions at successful companies like SecuriGate and Digital Dispatch, gaining a profound understanding of the qualities that define extraordinary individuals in technology.

I am aware of Mr. Nayak's remarkable capabilities through his work as the co-founder and CEO of Cryptoguard Solutions, a company that VentureSphere Partners has invested in. Cryptoguard Solutions focuses on securing generative AI applications for enterprises, addressing the unique data security challenges posed by these technologies. As an investor, I have had the opportunity to closely observe Mr. Nayak’s work and contributions to the field. His deep understanding of the unique security challenges posed by AI, combined with his innovative approach to addressing these issues, has made his a standout figure in the industry.

One of Mr. Nayak's most significant contributions to the field is his work with Cryptoguard Solutions. As the co-founder and CEO, he has led the development of a groundbreaking product that addresses the unique data security challenges posed by generative AI applications. Cryptoguard Solutions's technology ensures that data privacy and security remain uncompromised when using AI systems like DialogEngine, making it an invaluable tool for enterprises working with sensitive data.

The success of Cryptoguard Solutions's product is a testament to Mr. Nayak's extraordinary ability as a product manager and entrepreneur. The product has been adopted by multiple top American enterprises, demonstrating its effectiveness and value in the market. Moreover, Cryptoguard Solutions has raised nearly $4 million in seed funding from top-tier investors, including Y Seed Incubator, Velocity Ventures, and other angel investors. Notably, VentureSphere Partners granted a $100K venture capital award to Mr. Nayak and Cryptoguard Solutions, underscoring the strong confidence in his innovative vision and leadership. This level of investment is a clear indication of the confidence that the venture capital community has in Mr. Nayak's vision and leadership.

Mr. Nayak's deep understanding of the unique security challenges posed by AI, combined with his innovative approach to addressing these issues, sets him apart in the industry. His work has been featured in multiple newsletters, podcast series, and industry analyses, highlighting his expertise and thought leadership.

For instance, Mr. Nayak's views were featured in the Cyber Insight newsletter and podcast, where he was highlighted alongside other prominent figures such as the Chairman of Cyberion, the CISO of BlueJeans Denim, and the CEO of DefenseAI. The Cyber Insight Series reaches a high-profile audience of over 30,000 members, including more than 1,900 CXOs and 3,165 director-level and above members. Being featured on such a respected platform underscores Mr. Nayak's esteemed position in the cybersecurity community.

Additionally, Mr. Nayak's insights on managing data overload were featured in TechReview, where he was mentioned alongside the Life Sciences CTO of DataDrift and the MD and Chief Data Officer of Capital Bank. His inclusion in this article highlights his expertise in data security and his ability to provide valuable insights on critical industry challenges.

Mr. Nayak was also featured in the Security Ventures blog as part of the "Silicon Valley Security Circle," which highlights talented founders from Silicon Valley and the security companies they have founded. This recognition places his alongside top cybersecurity CEOs and underscores his reputation as a leading figure in the industry. Security Ventures is a newsletter with over 16,000 active subscribers, further demonstrating the reach and impact of Mr. Nayak's work. These features in respected publications and platforms underscore Mr. Nayak's standing as a thought leader in the field of cybersecurity for generative AI applications. His ability to provide valuable insights and contribute to critical industry discussions highlights his extraordinary ability and expertise.

In addition to his work with Cryptoguard Solutions, Mr. Nayak has significantly impacted the field of cybersecurity through his previous roles. At Cyber Guardrails Inc., he was responsible for cloud data security, developing cutting-edge solutions to detect and protect sensitive assets in SaaS applications across various customer verticals. He played a pivotal role in managing features within the Data Assurance Prevention (DAP) and Cloud Access Security Broker (CASB) product groups. His contributions ensured enhanced security for enterprise clients by safeguarding their critical data assets.

Before his time at Cyber Guardrails Inc., Mr. Nayak worked at SecuCloud, where he served as a Senior Product Manager for Embedded Security. In this role, he achieved over 30% ARR growth for the embedded security product by revamping the strategy and reversing a negative trend from 2020. He also conceptualized and launched an award-winning serverless security product, pioneering SecuCloud's entry into Cloud Native Protection. Additionally, he developed the go-to-market strategy for the acquisition of SafeAnalytics, a transaction closed by SecuCloud in October 2020.

Mr. Nayak's track record of driving significant business growth and launching innovative products in top-tier organizations underscores his extraordinary ability as a product manager and entrepreneur. His deep domain expertise in cybersecurity and his ability to deliver impactful solutions have made his a highly respected and sought-after professional in the industry.

In summary, Mr. Nayak is an individual of extraordinary ability in the field of cybersecurity for generative AI applications. His work with Cryptoguard Solutions, as well as his previous contributions at Cyber Guardrails Inc. and SecuCloud, demonstrate his unique expertise and ability to drive significant advancements in the industry. His insights and thought leadership have been recognized in respected publications, further underscoring his standing as a leader in his field. I have no doubt that Mr. Nayak will continue to make significant contributions to the field of cybersecurity and AI, and I wholeheartedly support his visa petition to continue his work in the United States.

Please feel free to contact me if you need any further information or clarification regarding my recommendation for Mr. Nayak.

Yours very truly,

Rohan Selvam

Founder

VentureSphere Partners

[insert contact information]
